headline: Morgan Stanley And Two Insurance Stocks Hit New Highs
summary: Morgan Stanley stock is in a buy zone of a base. A biometric identity name hit a new high after rebounding following a sell signal.

headline: Globe Life (GL) Up 1.7% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Globe Life (GL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
